dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8858 IH: Protecting American Voters’ Rights Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Moulton introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To allow Americans to sue Federal officials for constitutional violations of voting rights and election law.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protecting American Voters’ Rights Act.

section.header: Civil action against person acting under Federal election authority
section.text: Section 1979 of the Revised Statutes (42 U.S.C. 1983) is amended by inserting of any Federal election or election enforcement authority or before of any State.
